site.title: Upskill Fleet Academy
site.tagline: Expert-led training in AI Security, Cyber Security, Cloud, and Financial Marketing

trainer.name: Mr. xxxxxx
trainer.title: Principal Security & Cloud Instructor
trainer.bio: 15+ years across security architecture, cloud platforms, and regulated financial services. Former lead at a global bank and cloud partner; now focused on practical, compliance-aware training for teams adopting AI and hybrid cloud.
trainer.shortBio: Security architect, cloud strategist, and hands-on instructor for enterprise teams.

courses.summary: Secure design, deployment, and governance of AI systems in the enterprise.
Defense-in-depth, identity, and incident readiness for modern organizations.
Architecture, cost, and operations across major cloud providers.
Regulatory-aware marketing strategy for banks, fintech, and asset managers.

sessions.topic: AI Security: Threats to LLM Systems
Cyber Security: Zero Trust in Practice

curriculum.description: Shared vocabulary, risk context, and tooling setup across all four domains.
Domain-deep modules with exercises aligned to your catalog courses.
Cross-domain scenario: ship a cloud-hosted AI feature with security and marketing sign-off.

testimonials.quote: Clear, pragmatic framing of AI risks—we reused the threat model in our SOC review the same week.
testimonials.name: Priya S.

testimonials.quote: Cloud labs were the best part; our architects finally aligned on naming and tagging.
testimonials.name: Jordan L.

testimonials.quote: Marketing + compliance module gave us a checklist we could hand to legal.
testimonials.name: Elena R.

faq.a: Security engineers, cloud architects, product/engineering leads, and marketing leaders in regulated industries—or anyone building a cross-functional training program.
Recordings are provided where policy allows; placeholders in Resources will be replaced with links after each cohort.
Labs use sandbox-friendly patterns; you may use provided shared tenants or your own (with admin approval).

faq.q: Can this scale to a full LMS later?
faq.a: Yes. Content is data-driven from JSON; you can swap in an API, auth, and progress tracking without rewriting the page structure.
